crime.value: Multiple murders including shooting, burning, and stabbing in a mansion during a business party
crime.quote: The lights turn on the reval the maid with a bullet in her head

victim.value: Multiple victims including coworkers, maid, house owner, and narrator - no clear targeting rationale given
victim.quote: both of the coworkers were on fire! They were screaming in pain

closed_world.value: Large mansion where business party attendees are isolated during the murders
closed_world.quote: That is the biggest house I have ever seen

culprit_and_motive.value: Friend and mysterious masked man working together, but motive unclear
culprit_and_motive.quote: She pulls out a knife and stabs him repeatitly

investigator.value: Young narrator who becomes victim, tells story in first person but dies before investigating
investigator.quote: My vision slowly fading. Untill complete darkness.

suspect_architecture.value: Limited suspect pool: friend (accomplice with knife), mystery man in black (shooter), possibly mother's coworkers before elimination
suspect_architecture.quote: She pulls out a knife and stabs him repeatitly

red_herring.value: Electrical malfunction suggested as cause before revealing orchestrated murders
red_herring.quote: suddenly the lights go out with a loud POP !

social_world.value: Business hierarchy: mother's coworkers, house owner, maid - corporate power structure gathering

reveal_mechanic.value: Direct witness testimony from victim narrator - first-person observation of murders
reveal_mechanic.quote: in the flicking I can see my friend walking up to the owner

investigator_wound.value: Child narrator's betrayal by trusted friend - vulnerability through friendship
investigator_wound.quote: It's not what it looks like

_meta.title: ebook andrew wilsey the mystery of the cabin
